name: todo-rich-card
title: Todo Rich Card
author: ilinxa
description: Time-aware task card with OKLCH border-color engine (urgency green→red ramp), dual edit modes (popup + inline-toggle), controlled or uncontrolled state, JSON I/O, clipboard, DnD payload, granular events, permission predicates. Standalone-usable and registerable in kanban-board-01 via the included KanbanCardRenderer export.
